title: Shinjis power when inside an EVA in Rebuild
display_title: Shinjis power when inside an EVA in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's power when inside an EVA in Rebuild             Quote Post by Ollow » Thu Jul 18, 2019 2:03 pm I've combed through at least 10 pages of threads in the Rebuild section and didn't really see anything related to this. Feel free to point me to an already relevant thread if you know one so I can catch up on discussions there. We all know about the end of 2.22 when Shinji surprised us all by: gaining glowing red eyes powering up his own EVA displayed jaw dropping mastery over the creation and manipulation of AT Fields somehow enhanced his EVA physically gains the ability to do devastating non-physical attacks not based on any human technology open the Doors of Guf the ability to go soul/core diving extract/absorb souls By all accounts, Rebuild Shinji seems to gain godly powers (Awakened) just by being super emotional while in Unit 01. Being emotional as a condition seems to be confirmed by this dialogue in 3.33: 00:25:19 {Ritsuko} Also, your deep sync test results are in. 00:25:23 {Ritsuko} Your sync rate is 0.00%. 00:25:26 {Ritsuko} Even if you were to get in the Eva, it wouldn't activate. 00:25:30 {Sakura} There we go! 00:25:31 {Sakura} Isn't that great, Ikari-san? 00:25:33 {Ritsuko} Still, we cannot overlook the fact that the unit suddenly entered an Awakened state for twelve seconds earlier. 00:25:39 {Ritsuko} As a result, we've installed the DSS Choker on you. 00:25:44 {Shinji} What is this? 00:25:45 {Ritsuko} Insurance for us. 00:25:48 {Ritsuko} It's a physical safety device that prevents Awakenings. 00:25:51 {Ritsuko} It symbolizes both your punishment, and our mistrust in you. 00:25:55 {Shinji} What do you mean? 00:25:56 {Ritsuko} Should you succumb to your emotions while piloting an Eva, and the risk of Awakening becomes too great to avoid, 00:26:04 {Ritsuko} this will intervene by terminating your life.

[]: Re: Shinji's power when inside an EVA in Rebuild             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jul 18, 2019 2:12 pm Ollow wrote: Shinji is super special in Rebuild for some reason (is he already a god? an angel? an Adams??? No solid evidence for anything specific besides the red eyes but definitely special ) Gendo and Mari know about Shinji's true nature 100% (Gendo's plans could not have worked without him knowing in advance, and Mari seems to have just figured it out)
